title: Warcrimes Central
description: Death and Destruction for all that come.
body:
Explore the frigid ices from Aquaimarae with their dangers, or maybe enjoy a day of butchering of your livestock! 

Ranging from mods such as Enhanced AI to Mowzie's Mob, feel the fear at night paired with True Darkness! Could you survive as a zombie mines through your home's floor?

Take a gander in William Wyther's Overhaul with breathtaking trees complimented with Perception, Particular, Distant Horizons, and Simple Clouds! (PS: Reduce Distant Horizons and Simple Clouds to improve framerate)

Perhaps you want to rain hell and fire across the overworld? We have just what you need with Create, Valkyerian Skies, and Warium including their respective compats! Create F16's to wage war in the skies; build a tank utilizing Trackwork to raze villages to the ground, or just simply build a nuclear reactor either in Warium or Create: Nuclear. Take your pick!

All in all, you can be a farmer, explorer, miner, dictator, warrior; whatever it is you desire!

Just remember, the world is unforgiving and you are it's first meal in a **long** time...

___________________________________

CORE MODS:
Valkyrian Skies / ClockWork / Create / Warium / Lithosphere / William Wyther's Overhaul / CS Augmentations / Meds and Herbs / TACZ / CC:Tweaked / TrackWork / Ice and Fire / Monster Expansion / Cold Sweat / Enhanced AI / Create Big Cannons / Distant Horizons

FUN MODS:
Mugging Villagers / Meds and Herbs / Hex Casting / The Magic Mirror / Applied Energistics 2 / Consecration / Create Nuka / Occultism / Immersive Melodies

___________________________________

CORE MODS are mods that are tested first for compatability with eachother per update and have priority in what is kept in the mod when incompatabilities arise, with a few listed above. FUN MODS are a few mods we listed that I find rather 'fun' and the like. :>
